title: NakronaStructure
body:
![FallenCastle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/103fd15111296d1440f7f64b6efc328fd083f940.jpeg)

Description

Nakrona structure is a mod that adds various structures, dungeons, traps, in which there are prizes if the player manages to avoid or complete the existing structures, dungeons, traps.
In this mod, I focus on where players can end at any time if they enter an unknown structure, so that players are more careful and challenged in conquering existing structures or dungeons.

This mod is great for those who like difficult gameplay
